faq.question: Can you stake XRP?
faq.answer: XRP does not have native staking like Ethereum, but you can earn yield by lending XRP on platforms like Nexo, Celsius, or through DeFi protocols. APY typically ranges from 3-7%.

howWeCalculate.intro: This xrp staking rewards calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
Our algorithm applies the relevant formulas using your inputs
Results are calculated instantly in your browser — nothing is sent to a server
Review the detailed breakdown to understand how each factor affects your result
